voices.text: Feel the power of the cult!
Feel the power of the cult!
Don't trample the beautiful sprinkles! That makes me angry!
No sweet sugar jewellery for you, intruder!
This is not the Candy Carnival! You should leave!
Flee as long as you can!
Annihilon's might will crush you all!
No mortal or undead will steal my secrets!
Come to me, my allys and underlings.
I might be trapped but not without power
Ages come, ages go. Ashmunrah remains.
Dance for me your dance of death!
Feel my gentle kiss of death.
That's what I call easy listening!
You can run but you can't hide
To me, creatures of the wild!
My instincts tell me about your cowardice.
Feel the power of the beast!
I will regain my honor with your blood!
Show that you are a worthy opponent.
You are not loved by this world!
DO NOT LEAVE THIS WORLD AS A WIMP!
I will fill MY cushion with YOUR hair! CLUCK!
Don't run, you'll just lose precious fat.
Darkness is the mother of all knowledge!
Give your blood to the Dark God!
Feel the power of my magic, tiny mortal!
Be careful what you wish for.
Let me take a look at you.
Since you didn't eat your spinach Bogey comes to get you!
Too bad you did not eat your lunch, now I have to punish you!
Even if you beat me, I'll hide in your closet until you one day drop your guard!
You better had believe in me!
I'll take you into the darkness ... forever!
I can give you a hand... or two.
I will turn you into something more useful!
Bones are just sticks. They break easily.
Only the Wild Sun shall shine down on this world!
We came tooo thiiiiss wooorld to... get youuu!
Want fairy floss? I will feed you up.
Did you have to come here, little one? I just wanted to lay around and take it easy.
Ah, sweet air... don't you miss it?
Hey, maybe you want to strike a deal... no?
Stand and deliver! Your money... AND your life actually!
You will not leave this place breathing!
Think I can't see you? Think again...
You are one of THEM! Die!
I see colours, all colours! Or are these just illusions?
Nobody will ever escape from this place, muwahaha!!!
I am getting crazy here...Wa wa wahhh!!!
Work in the Chocolate Mines? No, no, leave it to the sugar cubes.
Nothing better than to lie on the vanilla sugar beach on a sunny day.
You set foot on forbidden ground? Outrageous!
Let the deceased rest in peace!
Good morning citizen. How may I serve you?
I must dispose of my masters enemies!
From the spirits that I called Sir, deliver me!
This will be your last dance!
This is a nightmare and you won't wake up!
You're a threat to this realm! You have to die!
Feel the power of my runes!
You are no match to us!
This is where your path will end!
Djon't djare stjare injo the eyes of the djeep!
Ljeave this sjacred pljace while you cjan
This prison break will have casualties!
No one will imprison me again!
ISHH THAT THE BESHHT YOU HAVE TO OFFERRR, TIBIANSHH?
MY SHHEED IS FEARRR AND MY HARRRVEST ISHH YOURRR SHHOUL!
It's a good day to destroy!
Come closer to learn the final lesson
You don't need this magic anymore.
You are no match for the scourge of the seas!
You move like a seasick whale!
People like you are the plague and I'll be the cure!
You all will pay for not helping me!
Phew, what an awful smell ... oh, that's me.
You will suffer the same fate as I do!
I'm not here. I am there.
The night is coming for you.
Too late... No turning back now.
I might use some parts of you in my next creation!
You're only a testsubject to me!
You can't beat what you can't comprehend!
I bet it was you who killed my mom!
You have been chosen for a harvest!
Feel the wrath of mother Tibia!
I wish you a merry trip to hell!
Inferior creatures, bow before my power!
Let me take a look at you!
Flee as long as you can.
For the Daughter of the Stars!
For the Daughter of the Stars!
Feel the sting of my arrows!
Thy blood will quench the soil's thirst!
Flood the room with curious energy!
Behold the all permeating powers I draw from this gate!!
MWAAAHAHAAA!! NO ONE!! NO ONE CAN DEFEAT MEEE!!!
You will rise as my servant!
Praise to my masters! Long live the triangle!
You will die in the name of the triangle!
You won't stop my masterplan to flood the world market with fake Bonelord language dictionaries!
My calculations tell me you'll die!
Beware! My evil monolog is coming!
I'm the one who puts the cute into execute!
Are you posing a threat to this realm? I suppose so.
I am not as kind as my sisters!
You shall burn in the thornfires!!
DOWN with the followers of the bog!!
Hey, what's that burnt stench... isn't that... YOU?
Feel the wrath of mother forest!
No run so much, must stay fat!
Have you ever seen the Big Ice Cream Machine?
I don't like the way you look!
There is a stone in your shoe!
I WILL FEAST ON YOUR SOUL!
I was baked just a few days ago. So much to discover here!
Have you seen my truffle baker?
I should visit the Candy Carnival.
You are no match for me!
Me the greenest and the meanest!
Me have power to crush you!
Give me your sweets! They are mine to devour!
Hm? Where ... where are you now?
You can't ever be rich enough!
We are the right hand and the left hand of the seven!
Witness the might of The Order of the Falcon!
Flinch even once, and I will crush every fiber within you!
I wish you a merry trip to hell!
Your tainted soul belongs to us anyway!
You should consider bargaining for your life!
I'll sacrifice yours souls to seven!
I'm bad news for you mortals!
Your puny skills are no match for me.
Your fragile bones are like toothpicks to me.
You little weasel will not live to see another day.
I'm just a messenger of what's yet to come.
I'm taking you down with me!
I will sing a tune at your grave.
Show me how good you are without some rolled newspaper!
So you think you are cool?
I hope it is not too cold for you! HeHeHe.
Feel the wrath of the witch!
Oh how you will regret to have disturbed me!
I will teach them all to leave me alone!
The smell of fear follows you.
Nothing will remain but your scorched bones!
Did you know... there are over 200 bones in your body to break?
Did you know... a lot of so-called trivia facts aren't even remotely true?
Did you know... fear can be smelled?
Did you know... you could die in 1.299.223 ways within the next ten seconds?
Your pain will be beyond imagination!
You can't defeat me! I will resurrect and take your soul!
You will be my toy on the other side!
What a disgusting smell of life!
You will endure agony beyond thy death!
Ahhh, your life energy tastes so delicious!
Be gone, mortal! This is not your place!
I guard this site in Suon's name!
I might reward you for killing my brother ~ with a swift death!
We are the brothers of fear!
You will endure agony beyond thy death!
I can't work wizh zuch dizturbancez!
Where are zhe guardz when you need zhem!
Think I saw a nice gem back there, I need to...
Die in the name of Science!
You will regret interrupting my studies!
I am going to play with yourself!
No one matches my battle prowess!
The eternal flame demands its due!
Look into my eyes! No, the other ones!
The mirrors can't contain the night!
Feel the power of my magic, tiny mortal!
Be careful what you wish for.
You will make sssuch a fine ssstatue!
There isss no chhhanccce of essscape
Are you tired or why are you moving thhat ssslow <chuckle>
I have a contract here which you should sign!
I sence so much potential in you. It's almost a shame I have to kill you.
Yes, slay me for the loot I might have. Give in to your greed.
Wealth, Power, it is all at your fingertips. All you have to do is a bit blackmailing and bullying.
Come on. being a bit evil won't hurt you.
Bow to the power of the iron bull!
This time the prey is you!
The mirrors can't contain the night.
Fortune brought you here, now let us lead you.
Let me show you your destiny!
There is no escape now, friend.
A prayer to the almighty one!
Feel the power of the Mooh'Tah!
You will make a fine trophy.
Let me hear the music of battle.
Another one to bite the dust!
I love the smell of rotten flesh.
The earth will take you back.
Take that creature off my back!! I can feel it!
You will regret interrupting my studies!
You will be the next infected one... CRAAAHHH!
Run as fast as you can.
Oh by the gods! What is this... aaaaaargh!
Fear the wrath of the wronged!
Close your eyes... I want to show you something.
Peak a boo, I killed you!
I've been in the shadow under your bed last night.
You never know what hides in the night.
I remember your face - and I know where you sleep.
Only the sweetest and cruelest dreams for you, my love.
We are the true sons of the desert!
I will leave your remains to the vultures!
We are swift as the wind of the desert!
I will leave your remains to the vultures!
We are the true sons of the desert!
We are swift as the wind of the desert!
You will not tell anyone what you have seen!
Looking at a nymph can blind you. Be careful, mortal being!
Are you one of those evil nightmare creatures? Leave this realm alone!
Come here, sweetheart! I won't hurt you! *giggle*
Deixe-me dar uma olhada em voce!
Now chhhou shhhee me ... Now chhhou don't.
Chhhhou are marked ashhh my prey.
Hope you die and loooosh it!
Oh my, you forgot to put your pants on!
Dream a little dream with me!
You will not get my treasure.
Glamour, glitter, glistering things! Do you have any of those?
You might be a threat! I'm sorry but I can't allow you to linger here.
Let's try a step or two!
You are looking a bit feverish!
You will not live to tell anyone!
Look what has stepped into my trap!
This was the initial trick, but the second follows quick!
Look into my eyes! No, the other ones!
The mirrors can't contain the night!
There is nothing here for you and you will die alone.
You will obey and you will kneel and you will BOW TO US.
Now your life is come to the end, hahahaha!
Throw the soul on the altar!

types.name: Priestess of the Wild Sun
types.description: a priestess of the wild sun

voices.text: There is only one true sun!
We will make you one of us!
It's not a trick, it's Rahemos.
I will make you believe in magic.
Let's see how good you are!
My little beetles, go forth, eat, feast!
THE DARK TIDE WILL SWALLOW YOU...
When I'm finished with you, you'll be a shadow of your former self.
Come forth from the shadows, my minions...
The shadows follow your every step...
FEEL THE TRUE MEANING OF VANQUISH!
HAHAHAHA DO YOU WANT TO AMUSE YOUR MASTER?
ZHE TIME OF ZHE SNAKE HAZ COME!
Life is such a fickle thing!
No I don't work in the mines right now. That's my day off.
YOU HAVE BAD BREATH, TAKE A MINT!!!
Nightmarish monster! This dream is not meant for you!
You won't steal my robe! Back off!
You are not allowed to lay eyes on me in this shape!
Are you stalking me? You will bitterly regret this!
I will eat you in your sleep.
I am the darkness around you...
You will become a feast for my maggots!
Nobody will ever escape from this place, muwahaha!!!
Leave as long as you can.
I will end your torment. Do not run, little mortal.
*SNIFF* *SNIFF* BLOOD! I CAN SMELL YOU, MORTAL!!
What a beautiful day in Candia.
Time for a bath in the Hot Milk Springs, I guess.
You have to taste my latest creation!
Please stand still and try my newest creation.
Let's battle it out in a duel!
I'll fight here in eternity and beyond.
Another foolish adventurer who tries to beat me.
These mine is ours... you shall not pass.
I teach you that even heroes can die!
You will die begging like the others did!
You can't run or hide forever!
I'm the executioner of the Seven!
The judgement is guilty! The sentence is death!
Do you really think you can stand?
What, are you afraid? So you should be!
Die in the flames of true righteousness!
I call you, my bats! Come!
Come, let me kiss you, darling. Oh wait, I meant kill.
Enjoy the pain - I know you love it.
You won't regret you came to me, sweetheart.
Don't struggle. We don't want to waste a drop of blood now, do we?
Come my maidens, we have visitors!
If music is the food of death, drop dead.
Your stuff will be mine soon!
I'll cut you a bloody grin!
For hurting me, my sire will kill you!
Is that the best, you can throw at me?
I've seen orcs tougher than you!
Even a rat is a better mage than you!
Learn the secret of our magic! YOUR death!
The dark ones.. must be stopped... unholy, twisted, EVIL!
No... don't go further stranger... danger lies in every step...
An enemy of the worm shall become his food!
The great worm will swallow you!
From the earthy depths he comes and brings freedom!
You can learn a lot from us.
Our wisdom and knowledge are unequalled in this world.
That knowledge would overburden your fragile mind.
I wouldn't expect you to understand.
One day Yalahar will return to its former glory.
You will run out of resources soon enough!
One little mistake and you're all are mine!
I know you will show a weakness!
Your fear will make you prone to mistakes!
